CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAREN W. YIU, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 1-415-703-5385 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb

Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAREN W. YIU, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 1-415-703-5385 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Off calendar in light of ruling on demurrer. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2015 Continued To May-06-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Deputy Attorney General KAREN W. YIU of the State of California Department of Justice, Tel No. (415) 703-5385 appearing for Defendant State Board of Equalization;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling with the modification that, per agreement of parties, Plaintiff may have 20 days leave to amend. DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff has 20 days leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Deputy Attorney General KAREN W. YIU of the State of California Department of Justice, Tel No. (415) 703-5385 appearing for Defendant State Board of Equalization;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling with the modification that, per agreement of parties, Plaintiff may have 20 days leave to amend. DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff has 20 days leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
